title: Chabrias Double Wall Stainless Steel Wine & Champagne Ice Bucket Cooler - Perfect Wine Cooler for Bottles & Champagne Chiller, Essential Drinks Bucket for Any Occasion
features: {{DOUBLE-WALL INSULATION}} This silver plastic cooler with its dual-layer design acts as an insulated wine bottle cooler, ensuring your wine, champagne, or prosecco stays perfectly chilled.
{{VERSATILE FOR ANY OCCASION}} This stylish silver plastic wine bucket and bottle cooler is ideal for every event, functioning as a table wine cooler or a portable wine cooler, indoors or outdoors.
{{FITS MOST 750ML BOTTLES}} This practical wine bottle cooler comfortably accommodates standard 750ml wine bottles, serving as an efficient wine chiller bucket and champagne cooler.
{{DURABLE SILVER PLASTIC}} Crafted from sturdy silver plastic, this double-wall bottle cooler is a long-lasting wine gadget and an elegant wine bottle cooler for all your needs.
{{ELEGANT & FUNCTIONAL CHILLING}} This silver plastic wine cooler bucket offers both style and practicality, working as a sophisticated champagne cooler and an effective wine bottle chiller
description: Product Description PERFECT SIZE FOR THE PARTIES: This is a perfect ice bucket that every party needs. It's suitable for all the bars and any cocktail party. It looks classy and elegant at any dinner table or bar table. DOUBLE-WALLED: Perfectly suited to either contemporary or traditional settings, the cooler features double-wall insulation to keep your wine bottles chilled and a brushed finish. This wine cooler could be carried anywhere and no need to worry about drinks getting warm. CHILLED DRINKS ALL THE TIME: You will always have perfectly chilled drinks with this ice bucket. This ice bucket can be used as a wine cooler, beer bottle bucket, and as cooler for other types of drinks. Double Wall Stainless Steel Wine Champagne Ice Bucket Cooler EASILY KEEPS WINE, PROSECCO, AND CHAMPAGNE AT THE PERFECT TEMPERATURE ELEGANT, SOPHISTICATED, AND MODEREN DESIGN NO ICE REQUIRED: SAY GOODBYE TO UGLY WATERMARKS SUITABLE GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION: Everyone loves to have this wine cooler as it will be used for all kinds of parties and occasions. It's a lovely gift you could give to your friends and family. MATERIAL: This wine cooler is made of stainless steel, because of the material this item lasts longer and sturdy enough to hold the bottle. It is so easy to maintain and clean. DIMENSIONS: Size approx. 18 x 12 cm
